feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101B19 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 14, 20:00 - 22:00 UTC

Mar 3, 19:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 14/04/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 14/04/2026 22:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance for 90 minutes each.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101B19 to rack ERI0102E01C.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS6] [Dedicated Servers] - T06C22 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 23, 11:00 - 12:00 UTC

Feb 24, 15:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 23/03/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 23/03/2026 12:00 UTC
Service impact : VRack on T06C22 will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L102A11 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 20, 02:00 - 03:00 UTC

Feb 20, 16:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack L102A11.

Start time : 20/03/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 20/03/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in L102A11.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

End time : 18/03/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during maintenance for 1 hour.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [YNM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack YNM0102F01A maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 16, 00:00 - 01:00 UTC

Feb 17, 17:33 UTC
Update - This maintenance has been re-scheduled.
Below you can find the new information regarding the operation.

Start time : 16/03/2026 00:00 UTC
End time : 16/03/2026 01:00 UTC
Service impact : Public and vRack networks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in YNM0102F01A.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

Feb 10, 19:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack YNM0102F01A.

Start time : 16/03/2026 00:00 UTC
End time : 16/03/2026 01:00 UTC
Service impact : Public and vRack networks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in YNM0102F01A.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 12, 03:00 - 04:00 UTC

Feb 24, 15:40 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting Rack 24C20.

Start time : 12/03/2026 03:00 UTC

Service impact : Servers will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance.
We will be migrating Rack 24C20 to 24C19.
